# SpatialAudioDebug.DebugDrawRadius property

Draws wireframe spheres for the inner radius (cyan) and outer boundary (orange) at runtime (in-game) when volume attenuation is enabled.

Note: Radius shapes are always shown in the editor when the node is selected.

```csharp
public bool DebugDrawRadius { get; set; }
```
